context.description: Create integration tests for all 5 critical Phase 1 user flows: (1) PDF upload → Celery job → tradeline extraction, (2) CROA gate → dispute letter generation → rate limit enforcement, (3) Stripe checkout → payment confirmation → premium upgrade, (4) Lob mailing dispatch → tracking, (5) Email notification delivery.
acceptance_criteria: backend/tests/integration/test_payments.py: tests Stripe webhook processing with test event payload, verifies idempotent re-delivery (insert ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING), verifies payment record created in payments table
backend/tests/integration/test_rate_limiting.py: tests free tier limit enforcement (2 uploads/3 letters), verifies 429 on limit exceeded, verifies premium bypass
backend/tests/integration/test_croa.py: tests CROA gate enforcement on letter generation endpoints (403 if not accepted), tests /croa-accept endpoint updates profiles table
backend/tests/unit/test_lob_service.py: mocks Lob API, tests send_dispute_letter returns {lob_letter_id, tracking_number}, tests error handling on Lob API failure
backend/tests/unit/test_email_service.py: mocks SendGrid, tests 4 email templates render correctly, tests notification_log write
backend/tests/unit/test_celery_worker.py: tests pdf_worker task signature, tests job status update on completion/failure
All tests pass with: pytest backend/tests/ -v (minimum 80% pass rate, 0 failures on critical paths)
frontend/src/components/__tests__/CROADisclosureModal.test.tsx: tests modal renders, checkbox enables button, form submission
implementation_approach: Step 1: Read backend/tests/conftest.py for existing test fixtures (Supabase mock, JWT mock)
Step 2: Read backend/tests/integration/test_api_integration.py for integration test patterns
Step 3: Read backend/tests/unit/test_auth.py for auth mock patterns
Step 4: Create test files for each critical path following existing conftest fixtures
Step 5: Mock external services: Stripe (use stripe-mock or webhook payloads), Lob (mock HTTP), SendGrid (mock SMTP)
Step 6: Add test for rate limit Redis key creation/TTL
Step 7: Add frontend tests for CROADisclosureModal
Step 8: Run full test suite and fix failures
pre_analysis: Read backend/tests/conftest.py - fixtures and mock patterns
Read backend/tests/unit/test_tradelines_api.py - unit test patterns for routes
